temporal_resolution: Mixed: 1-min (Hyytiala), 10-min (DE-HoH, Rosalia), daily (Donana); aggregated to daily

sensor_details.FI_Hyytiala: T168 Pt100 at 16.8m, OTT Pluvio at 1.5m, TDR SWC at -4cm, Pt100 Tsoil at -3.5cm
sensor_details.Germany_DE-HoH: Tair50HMP at 49m, precip50 tipping bucket at 50m, TDR SM at -10cm, TC Tsoil at -5cm
sensor_details.Donana: Manual thermometer at 1.3m (El Palacio), automated AWS at ~2m (HIDROMET)
sensor_details.Rosalia: Vaisala HMP at 2.0m, tipping bucket at 1.5m, TDR soil at -10cm

unit_conversions: None required - all source data already in degC, mm, vol%
